title: Homythe Funny Christmas Mugs, Nice Naughty Matching Christmas Coffee Mugs, 2 Pack 11oz Holiday Drinking Cups, Holiday Party Cups for Table Decor, Xmas White Elephant Gifts for Women Men Couples
features: Chuckles and Sips: This Christmas mugs set is not just for drinks, they're your daily dose of laughter! Featuring hilarious holiday designs, they add a touch of humor to your sips.
Elegant Packaging: The mugs come packaged in an elegant Christmas gift box, making it an ideal present for friends and family, or a delightful addition to your own holiday collection.
Holiday Cheer: Whether you're sipping your morning brew or indulging in a festive drink, this Nice and Naughty mugs set is a delightful way to infuse some holiday cheer into your day.
High-Quality Ceramic: Crafted from durable ceramic, these mugs are not only amusing but also built to last, ensuring many seasons of enjoyment.
Perfect Size: With an 325ml (11 oz) capacity, the ceramic mug is just the right size for enjoying your favorite hot beverages, whether it's hot chocolate, coffee, or tea.
description: SPECIFICATION: Material: Ceramic Capacity: 325ml (11 oz) Package Includes: 2 x Christmas Mugs NOTE: ->Due to the different displays of the computers, the color of the real item may be slightly different from the picture shown. ->Please allow 0.5-1 cm errors due to manual measurement.
